title: Commands
snippet: All commands use Discord slash command syntax. Click any command to see full details, usage examples, and screenshots. <required> must be provided [optional] can be omitted Moderation Economy Leveling

title: Command Reference
snippet: All commands use Discord slash command syntax. Click any command to see full details, usage examples, and screenshots. <required> must be provided [optional] can be omitted Moderation Economy Leveling

title: Moderation
snippet: /ban Ban a user from the server (permanent or timed) mod.ban Syntax /ban <user> [duration] [reason] Parameters Name Type Required Description user User Yes The user to ban duration String No Duration

title: Economy
snippet: /balance Check your or another user's balance economy.balance Syntax /balance [user] Parameters Name Type Required Description user User No User to check. Defaults to yourself Examples /balance — Chec

title: Leveling
snippet: /rank Display rank information for a user leveling.rank Syntax /rank [user] Details Shows level, XP, XP needed for next level, and server rank position. /leaderboard Show the XP/level leaderboard leve

title: Games
snippet: /chess Start a chess game against another player or the bot — Syntax /chess [opponent] Parameters Name Type Required Description opponent User No Player to challenge. Leave empty to play against the b

title: Configuration
snippet: /settings Configure server settings admin.settings Syntax /settings <setting> [value] Examples /settings setting:daily-reward value:100 — Set the daily reward to 100 coins Details Central hub for all

title: Utility
snippet: /help Get help with bot commands — Syntax /help [command] Details Without arguments: shows all commands by category. With a command name: shows detailed help for that specific command. /ping Check bot

title: Owner Only
snippet: /statusmsg Set bot custom status message Owner only Syntax /statusmsg [message] /announce Send a bot update announcement to all configured channels Owner only Syntax /announce <title> <message> [color] /rpc Set the bot's rich presence (activity) Owner only Syntax /rpc <activity> /appearance Set bot online appearance (onl

title: Features
snippet: An in-depth look at everything Ammonite can do. Jump to: Moderation Economy Leveling Games Proxy Global Chat Tickets Auto-Mod Logging Welcome Suspicious More

title: Moderation
snippet: A full suite of moderation tools for managing your community.

title: Commands
snippet: /ban — Permanent or timed bans /kick — Kick members instantly /mute — Timed mutes with duration /timeout — Discord native timeout /warn — Warning system with history /purge — Bulk message deletion /lo

title: Moderation History
snippet: Every moderation action is logged and reviewable with /hist <user> . Warnings can be viewed with /warns [user] and removed with /unwarn .

title: Punishment DM Notifications
snippet: When enabled via /punishment-dm , users receive a DM when warned, muted, banned, or kicked. Users can also appeal punishments through the built-in appeal system.

title: Economy & Banking
snippet: A full virtual currency system with earning, spending, gambling, and banking.

title: Earning
snippet: /daily — Claim daily rewards (24h cooldown) /work — Work a random job to earn points /rob <user> — Risk robbing another user

title: Banking
snippet: /bank deposit <amount> — Deposit into your bank (protected from robbery) /bank withdraw <amount> — Withdraw from your bank /bank balance — View bank and wallet balances Loan system with interest and r

title: Gambling
snippet: /blackjack — Full blackjack with hit, stand, double /poker — Five-card draw poker /flip — Heads or tails coin flip /dice — Bet on dice rolls /slots — Slot machine with multipliers Note All currency is

title: Leveling System
snippet: Members earn XP by chatting. XP accumulates and unlocks levels with configurable role rewards. Automatic XP — users earn XP for messages (with cooldowns) Level-based roles — auto-assign roles at speci

title: Chess
snippet: Play against another member or the bot AI Full chess rules with move validation Interactive button-based interface for moves, draws, and resignation Board rendered as text with emoji pieces

title: Poker
snippet: Five-card draw poker with betting Hold and discard mechanics via buttons Standard poker hand rankings and payouts

title: Proxy System
snippet: A PluralKit-style proxy system that lets users send messages as different identities using webhooks.

title: How It Works
snippet: Create a proxy member with /proxy create <name> Set proxy tags (prefix/suffix) — e.g., {text} sends as that member Set a custom avatar with /proxy avatar <name> <url> Messages matching your tags are a

title: Cross-Server Global Chat
snippet: Link channels across multiple servers so messages relay in real-time.

title: How It Works
snippet: Create a channel with /globalchat create <name> Other admins join with /globalchat join <code> Messages relay to all linked channels via webhooks

title: Safety Features
snippet: Attribution — relayed messages prefixed with [GC] Rate limiting — 3-second per-user cooldown Content limits — 2000 chars, max 5 attachments Server muting — mute specific servers from sending or receiv

title: Ticket System
snippet: A support ticket system for managing user inquiries and issues. Ticket panels — create embed panels with a button to open tickets Auto-creation — clicking creates a private channel for user and staff

title: Auto-Moderation
snippet: Automated message filtering to keep your server clean. Spam detection — configurable thresholds for rapid messages Link filtering — block or whitelist specific domains Mention spam — limit mass mentio

title: Comprehensive Logging
snippet: Log server events to designated channels for transparency and record-keeping. Message logs — edits, deletions, and bulk deletes Moderation logs — bans, kicks, mutes, warns Join/leave logs — member joi

title: Welcome System
snippet: Welcome messages — customizable messages when members join Auto-roles — automatically assign roles to new members Variable support — placeholders for user names, server names, member counts Configure

title: Suspicious Account Detection
snippet: Automated system that analyzes new members and flags potentially suspicious accounts. Account age analysis — flags very new accounts Pattern detection — identifies bot-like username patterns Risk scor

title: Role Persistence
snippet: When a member leaves and rejoins, their roles are automatically restored. Configurable expiry period. Enable/disable with /rolepersistence .

title: Reaction Roles
snippet: Let members self-assign roles by reacting to messages. Create panels with /reactionrole . Supports custom and Unicode emojis.

title: Pride & Inclusivity
snippet: /pride <flag> — apply pride flag borders/overlays to avatars or images /pride custom_flag:<upload> — use your own flag image /flags — list all available pride flags /pronouns — set pronoun roles for yourself

title: Server Backups
snippet: Create and restore snapshots of your server configuration with /backup create and /backup restore .

title: Privacy & Data
snippet: /privacy — view the privacy policy in Discord /deletedata — permanently delete all your personal data

title: Permissions
snippet: Fine-grained, node-based permissions with hierarchical checking and wildcard support.

title: Permission System
snippet: Fine-grained, node-based permissions with hierarchical checking and wildcard support.

title: How It Works
snippet: Ammonite uses a node-based permission system similar to Bukkit/Spigot plugins. Every action is gated behind a permission node (e.g., mod.ban , economy.daily ). Admins can grant or deny these nodes at

title: Permission Hierarchy
snippet: Permissions are evaluated in this order (highest priority first): 1. User-specific 2. Role permissions 3. @everyone 4. Built-in defaults User-specific — permissions set directly on a user always win.

title: Wildcard Permissions
snippet: Wildcard Effect * Grants all permissions (use with extreme caution) mod.* Grants all moderation permissions economy.* Grants all economy permissions economy.games.* Grants all gambling game permission

title: Auto-Moderation ( automod.* )
snippet: Node Description automod.enable Enable auto-moderation automod.disable Disable auto-moderation automod.spam Configure spam protection automod.links Configure link protection automod.mentions Configure

title: Moderation ( mod.* )
snippet: Node Description mod.kick Kick members mod.ban Ban members mod.unban Unban members mod.warn Warn members mod.unwarn Remove warnings mod.mute Mute members mod.unmute Unmute members mod.purge Purge mess

title: Economy ( economy.* )
snippet: Node Description economy.balance View balances economy.daily Claim daily rewards economy.work Use work command economy.pay Pay other users economy.rob Rob other users economy.baltop View balance leade

title: Leveling ( leveling.* )
snippet: Node Description leveling.rank View own rank leveling.level View levels leveling.xp View XP leveling.leaderboard View XP leaderboard leveling.admin.add Add XP to users leveling.admin.remove Remove XP

title: Logging ( logging.* )
snippet: Node Description logging.view View log settings logging.channel Set log channels logging.enable Enable logging logging.disable Disable logging logging.events.messages Configure message logging logging

title: Utility ( utility.* )
snippet: Node Description utility.ping Use ping command utility.info View bot info utility.help Access help system utility.status View bot status utility.echo Use echo command

title: Rules ( rules.* )
snippet: Node Description rules.view View server rules rules.add Add new rules rules.remove Remove rules rules.edit Edit existing rules rules.list List all rules

title: Admin ( admin.* )
snippet: Node Description admin.restart Restart bot admin.presence Change bot presence admin.appearance Change bot appearance admin.settings Manage bot settings admin.permissions Manage permissions admin.confi

title: Global Chat ( globalchat.* )
snippet: Node Description globalchat.use Send messages in global chat channels globalchat.manage Create, delete, and manage global chat channels

title: Usage Examples
snippet: # Grant all moderation permissions to the Moderator role /permissions role-set @Moderator mod.* true # Deny all economy commands for @everyone /permissions everyone-set economy.* false # Allow a speci

title: Default Permissions
snippet: Group Default Permissions @everyone utility.ping , utility.help , utility.info Discord moderators Members with Discord's built-in moderation permissions automatically receive moderation command access

title: Privacy Policy
snippet: Ammonite is committed to protecting your privacy. Last updated: February 2026.

title: Data We Collect
snippet: Ammonite collects only the minimum data necessary: User IDs — to track economy, levels, warnings, and permissions. Guild IDs — to store per-server configuration and settings. Message Content — process

title: How Data Is Stored
snippet: All data is stored locally on the bot host machine as JSON files in the data/ directory. Cached in memory using ConcurrentHashMaps and periodically written to disk. Key Guarantees Data is never shared

title: Data Retention
snippet: Economy and leveling data is kept as long as the bot is active in the server. Moderation records are kept indefinitely for server admin reference. Proxy data is kept until the user manually deletes it

title: Your Rights
snippet: View your data — economy balances, levels, warnings, and proxy members are all visible through bot commands. Request deletion using /deletedata . This permanently removes your economy data, leveling p

title: Privileged Gateway Intents
snippet: Guild Members (GUILD_MEMBERS) — required for role persistence, suspicious account detection, welcome messages, and member cache for moderation. Message Content (MESSAGE_CONTENT) — required for proxy t

title: Global Chat & Webhooks
snippet: The Global Chat feature relays messages between linked channels via Discord webhooks. Relayed messages have a [GC] prefix. Messages are rate-limited and content-capped. Message content is forwarded in

title: Proxy System & Webhooks
snippet: The Proxy system sends messages via webhooks using user-configured display names and avatars. Servers can enable a [proxied] indicator. All proxy data can be deleted at any time by the user.

title: Contact
snippet: Use /deletedata to erase your personal data at any time. Contact the bot owner through the support server or Discord DM. Server owners can contact the bot owner for server-level data requests.

title: Setup Guide
snippet: Add Ammonite to your Discord server and get started in minutes.

title: 1 Invite the Bot
snippet: Use the official invite link to add Ammonite. You must have the Manage Server permission in the target server. Invite Ammonite

title: 2 Grant the Right Permissions
snippet: When invited, Ammonite will request the permissions it needs. For full functionality, grant Administrator , or at minimum: Manage Roles, Manage Channels, Manage Messages Ban Members, Kick Members, Mod

title: 3 Run the Auto-Config Wizard
snippet: Once the bot is in your server, run /autoconfig to launch the setup wizard. It will walk you through everything automatically.

title: Auto-Config Wizard
snippet: The fastest way to configure your server is the auto-config wizard . Run /autoconfig and it will walk you through setting up: Moderation log channel Message log channel Join/leave log channel Suspicio

title: Manual Configuration
snippet: Alternatively, configure individual features with these commands: /settings — general server settings /logging — configure log channels /levels enable — enable the leveling system /points enable — ena

title: Setting Up Permissions
snippet: By default, only basic utility commands are available to all users. To grant moderation access to your staff: # Give moderators all moderation permissions /permissions role-set @Moderator mod.* true #

title: Support & FAQ
snippet: Frequently asked questions, troubleshooting, and how to get help.

title: Getting Help
snippet: Support Server Join the support Discord server for live help from community and bot staff. In-Bot Help Use /help or /help <command> for command usage info. Error Codes Use /error [code] to look up an

title: Frequently Asked Questions
snippet: Why aren't slash commands showing up? Global slash commands can take up to 1 hour to propagate after registration. If commands still don't appear: Ensure the bot was invited with the applications.comm

title: Common Error Codes
snippet: Use /error <code> in Discord for detailed info. Common codes: Code Meaning Solution 403 Missing bot permissions Ensure the bot has the required Discord permission (e.g., Ban Members) 703 Data operatio

title: Troubleshooting
snippet: Bot is offline / not responding? Check if the bot process is running on the host machine. Verify the bot token in config.json is correct and hasn't been regenerated. Check the logs/ directory for erro
